view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The linked use case explicitly states that the system automatically creates a unique Zoom meeting room and generates a link for each appointment, which is confirmed in the scenario provided. This directly supports the requirement for a unique link per meeting, as it details the process of link generation and its inclusion in confirmation emails and calendar invites. The evidence from the linked use case confirms that the system meets the specified security requirement for unique meeting links.
